subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the concrete footpath curb at the tunnel approach, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual attire with dark jeans and sneakers; the bold stop sign graphic dominates the shirt's front, lit by the mixed grey daylight and warm sodium spill from the tunnel.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: White long-sleeve shirt with a printed red stop sign, dark jeans, sneakers.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Medium skin tone, lit by cool overcast light warmed by the sodium tunnel glow.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark hair, dark eyes, relaxed brow, no distinguishing marks visible at distance.

background_setting: The approach to an urban underpass tunnel on a dry overcast morning. The two-lane dry concrete road leads from flat grey daylight toward the tunnel mouth, whose interior glows sodium-orange from rows of ceiling lights. A raised concrete curb and pedestrian footpath run alongside the approach where a person can stand, with tiled tunnel walls, retaining walls, and signage. The dim overcast approach gives way to the warm orange tunnel glow, conveying a transitional urban-underpass scene.

lighting.conditions: Dim flat overcast morning on the approach transitioning to warm sodium-orange tunnel lighting.
lighting.direction: Flat grey daylight from above on the open approach, with warm sodium light spilling from the tunnel mouth ahead and to the sides; the pedestrian is front-lit by the mixed light.
lighting.shadows: Soft, weak shadows under the overcast approach, warming and multiplying under the sodium tunnel lamps.
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool grey approach light warming to a sodium-orange glow near the tunnel; the mixed light keeps the red stop sign shirt graphic legible throughout.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective toward the glowing tunnel mouth, the pedestrian on the right footpath at the approach; retaining walls and lane lines lead into the sodium-lit tunnel.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Flat grey overcast and dry concrete transitioning to warm sodium-orange tunnel glow, with the red stop sign on the shirt as a vivid accent against both.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, transitional, ordinary urban-underpass morning drive.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating tunnel ceiling lamps, tiled wall lines, and retaining-wall panels leading into the tunnel.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the concrete approach and the footpath pedestrian, with the sodium-lit tunnel interior resolved ahead.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario at an urban underpass tunnel approach demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the footpath with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward toward the urban underpass on a dry overcast morning; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right concrete footpath at the tunnel approach, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed as the sodium tunnel glow grows ahead; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary on the footpath curb.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed on the dry concrete; the pedestrian remains on the footpath and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's white t-shirt.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on dry concrete toward the sodium-lit tunnel mouth on a dim overcast morning, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right footpath whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches and the light warms toward the tunnel glow; vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the footpath curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame as the tunnel glow surrounds the lane; vehicle maintains speed and lane position.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a dry overcast urban underpass approach of concrete leading toward a sodium-orange glowing tunnel mouth, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands on the right footpath at the approach facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their white shirt. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed under the warming light, remaining planted on the footpath curb. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the sodium-lit tunnel continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient underpass-approach driving sounds: a steady engine hum, tire noise on dry concrete, and a growing echoing resonance as the tunnel mouth nears. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive.
